articles.headline: Start-Up for $60 Billion: SpaceX Acquires Cursor in All-Stock Deal
articles.summary: SpaceX has exercised its option to acquire AI startup Cursor, a major inflection point for the company's entry into artificial intelligence. This $60 billion all-stock deal signals a strategic shift for corporations evaluating AI infrastructure providers and could reshape the competitive landscape for AI tools used by businesses.

articles.headline: AI Agents Drive Up Costs for Businesses as Firms Struggle with Token Bills
articles.summary: Rising costs from AI agents and automated reasoning models are creating financial pressure on corporations and SMEs, with many struggling to manage token-heavy expenses. This trend highlights a critical operational risk for businesses planning AI adoption, as costs may offset productivity gains unless more efficient infrastructure emerges.

articles.headline: DeepSeek Becomes China's Most Valuable AI Startup After $7.4 Billion Fundraise
articles.summary: DeepSeek has secured over $7.4 billion in its first round, becoming China's most valuable AI startup and intensifying global competition for AI infrastructure. This surge affects business planning for corporations and SMEs relying on international AI models, as geopolitical tensions and supply chain risks may increase with China's growing tech dominance.
